policy.purpose: Collect public repository candidates for reproducible setup-failure validation.
policy.contentRetention: The manifest stores repository metadata, provenance, clone pins, and scan summaries. Third-party repository contents stay outside git by default.
policy.scanSafety: metadata-only collection; no repository code executed
